import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      mut inserted: List<Int> = []
      mut j = 0
      mut placed = false
      while j < result.len()
        match result.get(j)
        when Some(w)
          if not placed and v < w
            inserted = list.push(inserted, v)
            placed = true
          end
          inserted = list.push(inserted, w)
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not placed
        inserted = list.push(inserted, v)
      end
      result = inserted
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn dedupe_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut combined = a
mut k = 0
while k < b.len()
  match b.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

let sorted = sort_asc(combined)
let unique = dedupe_sorted(sorted)

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < unique.len()
  match unique.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
